options.name: --base-url
options.description: Sets the base-URL to use for requests.

options.name: --config
options.description: The path to the JSON config file.

options.name: --expect
options.description:
Sets the expected status code of requests. Default:
200.

options.name: --request
options.description: Sets the request method. Default: GET.

options.name: --sleep
options.description:
Sets the sleep time between requests in milliseconds.
Default: 500ms.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Sets the timeout for requests in milliseconds. Default:
5000ms. If two values are provided, a random number between the two numbers will
be generated for each request.

arguments.name: urls
arguments.description:
The URLs to ping. If not specified, the URLs are read from 
the JSON config file.
